name: LYMPHOMATOID GRANULOMATOSIS
definition: angioinvasive + angiodestructive oligo- / monoclonal lymphoproliferative + granulomatous

demographics.Path: multiple sharply marginated masses adjacent to a bronchus causing obstructive
demographics.Histo: angiocentric infiltrate of atypical lymphoid cells (CD20-positive B-cells, some infected

discriminating_features: large masslike opacities (= granulomas + pulmonary infarcts)
multiple bilateral nodules in middle + lower lobes (80%)

general: large masslike opacities (= granulomas + pulmonary infarcts)
multiple bilateral nodules in middle + lower lobes (80%)
CT: peripheral subpleural 0.6-8.0 cm large nodules / masses
